title: Python sdk , please recommend golang to python library
body: I am using python shell API to execute buildah binary . But it is not very efficient. Could you please recommend any go2py library that I can use to consume buildah API from python code.

comments.body:
We don't have such a thing, but if the community wanted to add this, it would be accepted.

There is an API for Podman build that might satisfy you needs.
